<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>BaskiYönetim — Tanıtım</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --bg: #060612;
    --surface: #0f0f22;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    --accent: #7C3AED;
    --accent2: #1D9E75;
    --text: #f0f0f8;
    --muted: #6b7280;
    --card: #111124;
  }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    height: 100vh;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }

  /* Custom cursor */
  .cursor {
    position: fixed;
    width: 10px; height: 10px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: transform 0.1s, width 0.2s, height 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
    mix-blend-mode: screen;
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    position: fixed;
    width: 32px; height: 32px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.5);
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: left 0.12s ease-out, top 0.12s ease-out;
  }

  /* Background noise */
  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 1;
    opacity: 0.4;
  }

  /* Glow orbs */
  .orb {
    position: fixed;
    border-radius: 50%;
    filter: blur(80px);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
    transition: opacity 1s ease;
  }
  .orb-1 { width: 500px; height: 500px; background: rgba(124,58,237,0.15); top: -150px; left: -150px; }
  .orb-2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; background: rgba(29,158,117,0.12); bottom: -100px; right: -100px; }

  /* Slide container */
  #slideshow {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .slide {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0s;
  }
  .slide.active {
    opacity: 1;
    pointer-events: all;
  }

  /* Intro slide */
  .slide-intro {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .intro-logo {
    width: 72px; height: 72px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--accent);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800;
    color: #a78bfa;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    animation: logoPop 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
  }
  @keyframes logoPop {
    from { transform: scale(0.3) rotate(-10deg); opacity: 0; }
    to { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
  }
  .intro-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 88px);
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    line-height: 1;
    text-align: center;
    animation: slideUp 0.9s 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .intro-title span { color: #a78bfa; }
  .intro-sub {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 20px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    animation: slideUp 0.9s 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .intro-pills {
    display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 36px;
    animation: slideUp 0.9s 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .pill {
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--muted);
    background: var(--surface);
  }

  @keyframes slideUp {
    from { transform: translateY(30px); opacity: 0; }
    to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes slideIn {
    from { transform: translateX(-40px); opacity: 0; }
    to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; }
    to { opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes scaleIn {
    from { transform: scale(0.92); opacity: 0; }
    to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  }

  /* Feature slides */
  .slide-feature {
    padding: 60px;
    gap: 60px;
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .feature-left {
    flex: 0 0 380px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
  }
  .feature-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    animation: slideIn 0.7s 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .feature-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 52px);
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    line-height: 1.05;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .feature-desc {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #9ca3af;
    line-height: 1.7;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .feature-tag {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: rgba(124,58,237,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.3);
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #c4b5fd;
    width: fit-content;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }

  .feature-right {
    flex: 1;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .screen-frame {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 700px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 1px rgba(124,58,237,0.15),
      0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),
      0 0 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.08);
    animation: scaleIn 0.9s 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
    position: relative;
  }
  .screen-frame::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--accent), transparent);
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .screen-frame img {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
  }

  /* Outro slide */
  .slide-outro {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .outro-badge {
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent2);
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.1s both;
  }
  .outro-title {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 6vw, 72px);
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    line-height: 1;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.2s both;
  }
  .outro-title em { color: #a78bfa; font-style: normal; }
  .outro-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 48px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 700px;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.4s both;
  }
  .outro-stat {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 16px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .outro-stat-val {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #a78bfa;
  }
  .outro-stat-lbl {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .outro-cta {
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    animation: slideUp 0.8s 0.6s both;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  /* Progress bar */
  #progress-bar {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0; left: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--accent);
    z-index: 100;
    transition: width linear;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--accent);
  }

  /* Controls */
  #controls {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 28px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    z-index: 100;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    background: rgba(15,15,34,0.9);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 8px 20px;
  }
  .ctrl-btn {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: var(--muted);
    cursor: none;
    padding: 6px 10px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 16px;
    transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .ctrl-btn:hover { color: var(--text); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
  #slide-counter {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    min-width: 50px;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
  .dots {
    display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center;
  }
  .dot {
    width: 5px; height: 5px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--border);
    transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .dot.active { background: var(--accent); transform: scale(1.4); }

  /* Slide number badge */
  #slide-badge {
    position: fixed;
    top: 28px;
    right: 28px;
    z-index: 100;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* Logo top left */
  #top-logo {
    position: fixed;
    top: 24px;
    left: 28px;
    z-index: 100;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    opacity: 0.7;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  #top-logo:hover { opacity: 1; }
  #top-logo-mark {
    width: 32px; height: 32px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.4);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #a78bfa;
  }
  #top-logo-name {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  /* Keyboard hint */
  #hint {
    position: fixed;
    top: 28px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--muted);
    z-index: 100;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity 1s;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursor-ring"></div>
<div class="orb orb-1"></div>
<div class="orb orb-2"></div>

<div id="top-logo">
  <div id="top-logo-mark">3D</div>
  <div id="top-logo-name">BaskiYönetim</div>
</div>

<div id="hint">← → ok tuşları veya tıkla</div>
<div id="slide-badge"></div>
<div id="progress-bar" style="width:0%"></div>

<div id="slideshow">

  <div class="slide slide-intro active" id="slide-0">
    <div class="intro-logo">3D</div>
    <div class="intro-title">Baski<span>Yönetim</span></div>
    <div class="intro-sub">3D Baskı İşletme Yönetim Paneli</div>
    <div class="intro-pills">
      <span class="pill">Sipariş Yönetimi</span>
      <span class="pill">Fiyat Hesaplama</span>
      <span class="pill">Veresiye Takip</span>
      <span class="pill">Kasa & Raporlar</span>
      <span class="pill">Windows Masaüstü</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-1">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">01 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Dashboard</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Toplam ciro, tahsil edilen, veresiye özeti ve en çok satılan ürünler tek ekranda. Sabah işe başlarken ilk bakacağın yer.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Genel Bakış</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dashboard">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-2">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">02 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Yeni Sipariş</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Müşteri seç, ürün ekle, iskonto uygula — sipariş saniyeler içinde hazır. Toptan veya perakende fiyat otomatik uygulanır.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Satış</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Yeni Sipariş">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-3">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">03 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Ürün Kataloğu</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">İstediğin kadar ürün ekle, limit yok. Her ürün için filaman tipi, gramaj, baskı süresi ve net maliyet otomatik hesaplanır.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Katalog • Sınırsız</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ürün Kataloğu">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-4">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">04 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Fiyat Hesaplayıcı</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Gramaj ve baskı süresini gir, sistem elektrik, amortisman, işçilik maliyetini anında hesaplar. Toptan ve perakende fiyat hazır.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Maliyet Analizi</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Fiyat Hesaplayıcı">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-5">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">05 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Sabitler & Filaman</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Elektrik birim fiyatı, yazıcı gücü, amortisman ve kar marjlarını bir kez ayarla. Tüm hesaplamalar otomatik güncellenir.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Ayarlar</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Sabitler & Filaman">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-6">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">06 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">İskonto Profilleri</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Bayi, VIP müşteri gibi gruplara özel iskonto profilleri tanımla. Siparişte müşteriye göre otomatik uygulanır.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ İskonto Sistemi</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="İskonto Profilleri">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-7">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">07 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Müşteriler</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Her müşteri için cari hesap, toplam ciro, borç durumu ve sipariş geçmişi. Bir tıkla cari hesabı aç.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Cari Hesap</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Müşteriler">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-8">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">08 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Veresiye Takip</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Bekleyen tüm ödemeleri tek ekranda gör. Sipariş bazında kalan borç ve durum takibi.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Alacak Yönetimi</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Veresiye Takip">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-9">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">09 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Kasa</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Aylık gelir-gider grafiği, kasa bakiyesi ve bekleyen alacak. İşletmenin mali durumu net ve öz.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Muhasebe</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Kasa">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-10">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">10 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Giderler</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Hammadde, ambalaj ve diğer giderleri kategorize et. Tarihe ve kategoriye göre filtrele, toplamı gör.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Gider Takibi</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Giderler">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-feature " id="slide-11">
    <div class="feature-left">
      <div class="feature-num">11 — Özellik</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Raporlar</div>
      <div class="feature-desc">Ürün bazlı satış, kar marjı ve amortisman analizi. Hangi ürün ne kadar kazandırıyor, net olarak göster.</div>
      <div class="feature-tag">✦ Analitik</div>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-right">
      <div class="screen-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Raporlar">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="slide slide-outro " id="slide-12">
    <div class="outro-badge">Windows Masaüstü Uygulaması</div>
    <div class="outro-title">Her şey<br><em>hazır.</em></div>
    <div class="outro-grid">
      <div class="outro-stat">
        <div class="outro-stat-val">Sınırsız</div>
        <div class="outro-stat-lbl">Ürün Kataloğu</div>
      </div>
      <div class="outro-stat">
        <div class="outro-stat-val">Anlık</div>
        <div class="outro-stat-lbl">Fiyat Hesaplama</div>
      </div>
      <div class="outro-stat">
        <div class="outro-stat-val">Tam</div>
        <div class="outro-stat-lbl">Cari & Veresiye</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="outro-cta">3D Baskı İşletmeniz İçin Geliştirildi · Lisanslı Sürüm</div>
  </div>

</div>

<div id="controls">
  <button class="ctrl-btn" id="btn-prev">&#8592;</button>
  <div class="dots" id="dots"></div>
  <span id="slide-counter">1 / 13</span>
  <button class="ctrl-btn" id="btn-next">&#8594;</button>
  <button class="ctrl-btn" id="btn-play" title="Otomatik oynat">&#9654;</button>
</div>

<script>
const TOTAL = 13;
let current = 0;
let playing = false;
let timer = null;
const DURATION = 5000;

const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
const cursorRing = document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  cursor.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
  cursor.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
  cursorRing.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
  cursorRing.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
});

// Build dots
const dotsEl = document.getElementById('dots');
for (let i = 0; i < TOTAL; i++) {
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  d.className = 'dot' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
  d.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(i));
  dotsEl.appendChild(d);
}

function goTo(idx, animate=true) {
  const prev = document.getElementById('slide-' + current);
  prev.classList.remove('active');
  
  current = (idx + TOTAL) % TOTAL;
  const next = document.getElementById('slide-' + current);
  next.classList.add('active');

  // Reset animations by cloning children... simpler: remove/re-add active
  void next.offsetWidth;

  document.querySelectorAll('.dot').forEach((d,i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === current));
  document.getElementById('slide-counter').textContent = (current+1) + ' / ' + TOTAL;
  document.getElementById('slide-badge').textContent = current === 0 ? '' : current === TOTAL-1 ? 'FİNAL' : '0'+(current < 10 ? current : current);
  
  const pct = ((current+1) / TOTAL) * 100;
  const bar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
  bar.style.transition = 'none';
  bar.style.width = pct + '%';

  if (playing) startTimer();
}

function startTimer() {
  clearTimeout(timer);
  const bar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
  bar.style.transition = 'none';
  const pct = ((current+1) / TOTAL) * 100;
  bar.style.width = pct + '%';
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    bar.style.transition = `width ${DURATION}ms linear`;
    bar.style.width = ((current+2) / TOTAL) * 100 + '%';
  });
  timer = setTimeout(() => {
    if (current < TOTAL - 1) goTo(current + 1);
    else { playing = false; document.getElementById('btn-play').textContent = '▶'; }
  }, DURATION);
}

document.getElementById('btn-prev').addEventListener('click', () => { clearTimeout(timer); goTo(current - 1); });
document.getElementById('btn-next').addEventListener('click', () => { clearTimeout(timer); goTo(current + 1); });

document.getElementById('btn-play').addEventListener('click', () => {
  playing = !playing;
  document.getElementById('btn-play').textContent = playing ? '⏸' : '▶';
  if (playing) startTimer(); else clearTimeout(timer);
});

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === ' ') { clearTimeout(timer); goTo(current + 1); }
  if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { clearTimeout(timer); goTo(current - 1); }
  if (e.key === 'p' || e.key === 'P') document.getElementById('btn-play').click();
});

// Click right/left half to navigate
document.getElementById('slideshow').addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (e.clientX > window.innerWidth / 2) goTo(current + 1);
  else goTo(current - 1);
  clearTimeout(timer);
});

// Hide hint after 4 seconds
setTimeout(() => { document.getElementById('hint').style.opacity = 0; }, 4000);
</script>
</body>
</html>
